title: Advancing Technical Language Processing and Large Language Models in Industrial Applications: Insights from TLP COI Events in 2024
description: It remains challenging to integrate artificial intelligence (AI) and natural language processing (NLP) into complex engineering systems.
text:
Dawson, M. , Lukens, S. and Sharp, M. (2025), Advancing Technical Language Processing and Large Language Models in Industrial Applications: Insights from TLP COI Events in 2024, Special Publication (NIST SP), National Institute of Standards and Technology, Gaithersburg, MD, [online], https://doi.org/10.6028/NIST.SP.1500-37, https://tsapps.nist.gov/publication/get_pdf.cfm?pub_id=960066 (Accessed March 1, 2026)
